SMW Credits Tool v2.0

Generate Map16 Credit Tiles for Lunar Magic easily.

  • 1. Mapping
  • 2. Credits & Settings
  • 3. Export & Import

1. Character Mapping

Define which Graphic Tile ID (ExGFX) corresponds to which Text Character.

  • Load Graphics: Load your .bin graphics file to see the tiles.
  • Pick Tiles: Click the target 🎯 icon and select a tile on the image.
  • Preview: The tool shows you exactly how the character will look.
Auto-Load: Place palette.pal in the tool folder to load colors automatically.

2. Credits & Settings

Go to the Credits Tab to set up your text.

Source Input

  • File Mode: Load a .txt or .json file.
  • Direct Text: Paste your list of names directly into the text box.

Options

  • Optimize Columns: Automatically fits two short names into one row (Side-by-Side).
  • Capitalize Text: New! Check this to convert ALL text to UPPERCASE automatically.
  • Tile Size: Choose 8x8, 8x16 (Tall), or 16x16 (Full Block).

Map16 Settings

  • Start Page: Hex number of the Map16 page to overwrite (e.g. 14 for Page 0x14).
  • Act As: The behavior of the tiles (e.g. 25 for air/solid).

3. Export & Import

Generating the File

  1. Click Save .map16.
  2. Choose a filename (e.g. credits.map16).
  3. The tool generates a file compatible with Lunar Magic.

Importing into Lunar Magic

Important: The file contains the target page information!
  1. Open Lunar Magic.
  2. Open the 16x16 Tile Map Editor 🍃.
  3. Navigate to the page you selected (e.g. Page 0x14).
  4. Press F3 (or File > Import Map16).
  5. Select your generated file.

The tiles should appear instantly on the selected page!
